title: stachys balansae
intro: Stachys balansae is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae, commonly known as a type of mountain mint. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Stachys balansae include treating digestive issues, reducing fever, and relieving pain, as well as its use in treating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Stachys balansae can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent.
